name: io.github.ChunSam/kiwoom-mcp-server
title: Kiwoom Securities MCP Server
description: Read-only MCP server for the Kiwoom Securities REST API: market data, account inquiry, ISA tax tool

environmentVariables.name: KIWOOM_APP_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Kiwoom REST API app key (issued at openapi.kiwoom.com; VIRTUAL and REAL need separate keys)

environmentVariables.name: KIWOOM_MODE
environmentVariables.description: VIRTUAL (모의투자, mock trading) or REAL (실전투자, live account)

environmentVariables.name: ISA_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Opt-in switch for the ISA tax-allowance tool (set true together with ISA_TYPE / ISA_OPENED_ON)
